headlines.title: Fragile ceasefire in jeopardy as Iran reportedly fires missiles at Israel
headlines.summary: The fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran has been in place since early April.

headlines.title: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
headlines.summary: The president said he would like to see the weaponization fund proceed despite setbacks.

headlines.title: 'Bring 'em on': Delta wants United's crown over the Pacific, too
headlines.summary: Delta's president, Peter Carter, told CNBC that the carrier wants to take United on over the Pacific.

headlines.title: Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky
headlines.summary: Most consumers are not familiar with the role resin plays inside electronics like smartphones. A current shortage of the materials may push up prices.

headlines.title: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
headlines.summary: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions, despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing.

headlines.title: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
headlines.summary: In addition to typically living longer than their husbands, women also are more likely to need long-term care, which can be costly.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.summary: Investors seeking steady income can bolster their portfolios by adding dividend stocks with attractive yields.

headlines.title: Abel goes his own way with new Berkshire investments, including billions for AI
headlines.summary: Warren Buffett tells CNBC's Becky Quick new Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel has "launched" with his first major deal.

headlines.title: Crypto mutiny on Strategy: Shorts target 'MSTR' in bitcoin bloodbath
headlines.summary: Flows around Strategy (MSTR) and the company's variable-rate preferred stock STRC are turning bearish this week.

headlines.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
headlines.summary: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

headlines.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
headlines.summary: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO hype has traders flocking to this mid-cap stock
headlines.summary: Options volume is picking up in Nasdaq-listed Echostar, a $35-billion networking business based in Colorado that owns an estimated 3% of SpaceX stock.

headlines.title: U.S. stock futures mixed, oil prices surge as new attacks threaten the cease-fire with Iran
headlines.summary: U.S. stock-index futures largely erased initial losses Sunday, after a massive tech selloff on Friday interrupted Wall Street’s two-month rally, and after new developments threatened the fragile cease-fire in the Iran war.

headlines.title: The Wegovy pill is still dominating the GLP-1 pill market
headlines.summary: It has remained a top choice among Americans trying to lose weight even after the launch of Foundayo, Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 pill.

headlines.title: S&P 500 companies can’t stop talking about higher oil prices. But few say they’ll actually hurt profits.
headlines.summary: Only seven companies cited oil prices as a reason for cutting or not updating their profit outlooks for the year.

headlines.title: These are the market’s new hot stocks as investors flee from tech
headlines.summary: Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.

headlines.title: A new wave of weight-loss therapies aims to be better than today’s GLP-1s
headlines.summary: Retatrutide is one of those drugs. It helped people lose a massive amount of weight in clinical trials. It also improved sleep apnea and knee pain.

headlines.title: S&P 500 sees $1.8 trillion wipeout, Nasdaq tallies biggest point drop on record: What investors need to know about Friday’s selloff
headlines.summary: A remarkable two-month sprint higher for major stock-market indexes encountered its first major hiccup on Friday as the Nasdaq Composite plummeted more than 1,121 points — the biggest one day point drop on record, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

observations: High concentration in Communication Services with 75.4% of portfolio value, which is significantly above the maximum allowed sector allocation.
META represents a significant portion of the portfolio, which increases risk due to lack of diversification.
Cash position at 12.08% is above the minimum cash buffer of 5%, providing some liquidity but may indicate under-deployment of capital.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~7 share(s) to bring weight under 25%
Consider reallocating cash into sectors aligned with investor preferences such as AI/computing infrastructure, clean energy, or cybersecurity.
